data.name: Dominated By: Yandere Goth Girlfriend
data.detailed_description:
After suffering years of abuse from your goth yandere girlfriend, you escape to a remote town in the hope of finally being free of your girlfriend's merciless grip on your life. However, your peaceful life doesn't last long as she tracks you down and is angrier than she's ever been before. Will you endure her punishment? Or will you try to sweet-talk your way out of your painful predicament?

  • ~5.5K words

  • 3 Endings

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 28 Unique character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your goth yandere girlfriend tracks you down and punishes you for trying to escape from her
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
